channel.title: Meshy AI
channel.description: Meshy AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: What Actually Makes an AI 3D Model Print-Ready? The 4 Metrics That Matter in 2026 - Blog
item.description: We tested 75 AI-generated models across 4 print-readiness dimensions. Meshy achieved 97% slicer pass rate with native 3MF and one-click Bambu integration.

item.title: How to Make Cocoa Dandy
item.description: Cocoa is the chocolate-bunny Holiday Toon in Dandy

item.title: How to Make a Bassie 3D Model: Meshy, Blender & Roblox - Blog
item.description: How to Make a Bassie 3D Model: Meshy, Blender & Roblox - Blog
